characters.name: Amanda
characters.description: Amanda is a friendly, cute, young, clumsy fish that attends St. Grunch School for Clumsy kids. She is voiced by G. Hannelius. AmandaCharacter informationAge:About 5 years oldGender:femaleSpecies:Blue ChromisRelationshipsAllies:Bea GoldfishbergFinberleyBackground informationFirst appearance:A Charity Fair to RememberVoice by:G. Hannelius

characters.name: Angela Fishberger
characters.description: Angela FishbergerCharacter informationAge:16Gender:FemaleSpecies:AngelfishHome:Bud's PetsRelationshipsAllies:ShilohMiloJumbo ShrimpOscarLove interests:Oscar(ex-boyfriend)Jumbo Shrimp(boyfriend)Background informationVoice by:Felicia DayAngela Fishberger(pronounced as"angel-a") is an obsessed video-gamer and isOscar'sex-girlfriend. In one episode, it shows that she is Oscar's rival in a debate. Before the debate, they go on dates and activities such as diving, parasailing, and riding wild animals. She somewhat resembles a stalker, and Oscar believes she is trying to make him lose the debate. Yet, in the end, Angela is actually a very obsessed scrapbooker and was only trying to take pictures of Oscar for sentimentality. She later made an appearance in "Guys' Night Out", when she and Oscar officially became boyfriend and girlfriend.Shilohis Angela's crazy best friend who looks likeMilo. Angela is an adventurous girl who likes taking risks, like jumping from one tank to another without a parachute, dancing on the tables of restaurants, etc. ("Send Me an Angel Fish"). She loves video games and spends all day playing them. She is also similar to Oscar in many ways. Oscar and Angela first met in ("Send Me an Angel Fish"), when they both were rivals in a debate. Angela caught his attention the moment he looked at her, and just after they met, she asked Oscar out, but after their date, Oscar thought she was tricking him to win the debate. He accused her at the debate, and Angela told him that he was wrong, and the reason that she was spying on him was for love, and that all this time, she had taken photos of Oscar for her scrapbook. After that, the two continued dating.

characters.name: Babies
characters.description: BabiesCharacter informationGender:Male and FemaleSpecies:GuppiesBackground informationFirst appearance:"Bea Becomes an Adult Fish"Voice by:Kari Wahlgren Babies are the babies in the Daycare located inFish Flakes, Inc.. When Barb told Bea she had to work independently, she took Milo and Oscar to the Daycare full of babies so they can't distract her. Milo immediately saw the Daycare as a "paradise", while Oscar was panicking about the babies. Later, Milo wore a diaper and played with them, but Oscar, still terrified of the babies, wanted to leave, saying he can't understand anything they say to him. Milo then slept with the babies. Later when Bea decided to quit her job, she went to the Daycare to get Oscar and Milo. Oscar, who is screaming and avoiding the babies, tells Bea that Milo's in a diaper. Bea manages to pull Milo and Oscar from all the babies ("Bea Becomes an Adult Fish").

characters.name: Baby Face Bryant
characters.description: Baby Face BryantCharacter informationAge:AdultGender:MaleSpecies:SeahorseBackground informationFirst appearance:"Fishing for Compliments: The Albert Glass Story" (mentioned)  "Assignment: Babies"Voice by:Brian Doyle-MurrayBaby Face Bryantis a criminal who was disguised himself as a baby that used Oscar and Bea as a ploy to rob Bea's house. He was caught by Oscar and arrested at the end of "Assignment: Babies". His only appearance was in "Assignment: Babies". WhenMr. Baldwinwas giving one of each of his children to his students for an assignment, Baby Face Bryant was in the pile of babies disguised as one of them. He got given to Oscar and Bea as partners. Baby Face Bryant acted like a baby quite well, fooling Oscar and Bea for the first half of the episode. Oscar first sees Baby Face Bryant when he happily agrees to sleep at Bea's house for the night to take care of the baby. He walks into Bea's kitchen in the middle of the night when he sees a light being turned on and sees the baby making itself a sandwich. Baby Face Bryant tells Oscar that he was dreaming, only to Oscar tells Bea that the baby talked, but she doesn't believe him and reprimanded him for giving the baby a sandwich. The next day, Oscar apologizes and brings a teddy bear to give the baby. He walks into Bea's room where the baby is sleeping, but overhears Baby Face Bryant talking to his business partner on a phone about how great Bea's place is for stealing stuff. Oscar busts him, but Baby Face Bryant just acts like a baby again. Oscar tries to explained to Bea about Baby Face Bryant again, only to the latter to kicks him out of the tank. Not giving up hope, Oscar finally gets Baby Face Bryant to speak in front of everyone when Baby Face Bryant telling Oscar to knock it off. Baby Face Bryant escapes after everyone sees him speak and tries to crash a baby train. Oscar fights Baby Face Bryant on the train and he is finally arrested at the end of the episode.

characters.name: Baby Unicorn
characters.description: Baby UnicornCharacter informationGender:FemaleSpecies:UnicornBackground informationFirst appearance:"The Tale of Sir Oscar Fish"Voice by:Grey DeLisle Baby Unicornis a small unicorn who lives in Fishtankia. Oscar first saw the Baby Unicorn when he was in Fishtankia. The Baby Unicorn volenteered to vouch for the Fake Milo when Oscar scolded at him when he thought he was looking at his diary. On his way to defeat the Dragon Fish, Oscar rode on a red unicorn, while the Fake Milo rode on the Baby Unicorn ("The Tale of Sir Oscar Fish").

characters.name: Mr. Baldwin
characters.description: Mr. BaldwinCharacter informationAge:40s or 50sGender:MaleSpecies:SeahorseRelationshipsRelatives:100 to 200 offspringLove interests:Ms. Lips(fiancée)Background informationFirst appearance:"Bea Stays in the Picture"Voice by:Dana Snyder Human Mr. Baldwin Mr. Baldwinis a seahorse and teacher atFreshwater High. He was pregnant throughout most of the series, until giving birth to about 100 to 200 babies in the episode "Labor of Love" in season 3.[1]

characters.name: Bandanna Joe
characters.description: Bandanna Joe isHeadphone Joe's brother. He is the same type of fish as his brother. He and Headphone Joe have been seen fighting over something. He hates Headphone Joe and says they are "not brothers anymore." He has only been in one episode,Brother's Day.

characters.name: Barb
characters.description: BarbCharacter informationGender:FemaleSpecies:Barb fishHome:Bud's PetsProfessional informationAffiliations:Fish Flakes, Inc.Fish MallBackground informationFirst appearance:"Bea Becomes an Adult Fish"Voice by:Lauren TomNicol Zanzarella (Season 2)BarbwasBea's manager inFish Flakes, Inc.Besides her job at Fish Flakes, she also commonly works at theFish Mall. Fish Mall Barb is friendly and nice, but she later just wants people to work and be independent.

characters.name: Bassy
characters.description: BassyCharacter informationAge:62Gender:FemaleSpecies:Bass fishBackground informationFirst appearance:"Fish Sleepover Party"Voice by:Tress MacNeille Bassyis the waitress in theHokey Poke. Bassy was first seen whenOscarandMilotried to hatch up a plan to get toBea's party, but they cannot think in a empty stomach so they go to the Hokey Poke Diner. When they finished eating, Bassy handed out their checks. Oscar thanks her and says he likes her new hairstyle. She says it's not a new hairstyle, it's a growth, and she swims away crying ("Fish Sleepover Party"). Oscar, Milo, Bea, andEsmargotordered Flake Shakes, so Bassy gave it to them. When Milo was desperate to get money, he revealed that Bassy has feet. WhenChieftold Milo they don't need help when he needed a job at the Hokey Poke, Bassy showed Chief how many customers there were at the Hokey Poke ("Dollars and Fish").

characters.name: Bea Goldfishberg
characters.description: Bea GoldfishbergCharacter informationAge:16Gender:FemaleSpecies:GoldfishHome:Bud's PetsProfessional informationOccupation:StudentAffiliations:Freshwater HighRelationshipsRelatives:Mrs. Goldfishberg(mother)Norman Goldfishberg(father)Allies:OscarMiloShellseaFinberleyEsmargotClamanthaKoiAlbert GlassJumbo ShrimpLove interests:Steve Jackson(former crush)Brandon Bubbler(former crush)Oscar(boyfriend)Background informationFirst appearance:"Bea Stays in the Picture"Voice by:Chelsea Kane — Bea's catchphrase Beatrice "Bea" Goldfishbergis an overly dramatic, cheerful, intimidating goldfish and one of the three main protagonists ofFish Hooks. Her best friends areMiloandOscar. She is also friends withShellsea,Clamantha,Koi,FinberleyandEsmargot. To many other male fish, she is very pretty, as shown when she was going out on a lot of dates in "Doris Flores Gorgeous".

characters.name: Bessy
characters.description: BessyisBo Gregory's pet cow. Its odd how could she fit in a tank. It is also noted that Bessy's udder is always shown.

characters.name: Bird
characters.description: BirdCharacter informationGender:MaleSpecies:CockatooRelationshipsAllies:MiloBackground informationFirst appearance:"Flying Fish"Voice by:George TakeiBirdis a bird who lives in the pet store. When Milo tried to fly, he set a bird trap to attract a bird to fulfill his dream to fly. Milo started poking the bid with a stick, but the bird fought back and attacked Milo. When the bird was about to finish him off, Oscar and Bea pulled Milo away from te bird cage and dragged him back to the tank. Milo, who still wants to fly, is pulled from the tank by Mr. Mussels. He tells Milo that he has a real dream and his friends should support him. Oscar and Bea agreed, and the bird joined in. Milo noticed the bird could talk, and that he pecked and screamed at Milo because he upset him and fought him with a stick. Milo apologizes the bird, and the bird forgave him. The bird offered to help Milo fly by letting Milo ride on him and fly across the pet store, along with giving his friends a ride. As they flew across the store, Milo met the birds children and realized that he keeps apples under his wings. They all end up crashing to the light and set off the smoke alarm again ("Flying Fish"). When the gang went trick-or-treating outside the tanks for Halloween, they went to the bird, who gave each one of them apples ("Halloween Haul").

characters.description: Bjorñ OuhhfáhrrrgãwrdczhenCharacter informationAge:37Gender:MaleBackground informationVoice by:Tyler ChenBjorñ Ouhhfáhrrrgãwrdczhenis a foreign exchange student who only appears in the season 3 episode "The Brandon Bubble". He comes from the fictional country of Crenotaninia and is secretly 37 years old. He left his two kids and wife to learn about teenage life. WhenBrandon Bubblerbecame a normal kid, Bajorñ took over his career.

characters.name: Brandon Bubbler
characters.description: Brandon BubblerCharacter informationAge:17Gender:MaleRelationshipsLove interests:Bea(ex-girlfriend)Background informationVoice by:Lil' TwistBrandon Bubbleris a teenage singing sensation first introduced in "Dollars and Fish". He is a young pink colored fish and is most famous for his songU + Me = Luv. Apparently, almost everyone likes his music and knows him. He has short purple hair and wears a big, oversized blue and orange base ball cap with a large purple "B" on it. He also wears a blue shirt with another purple "B" on it with orange neck trim. He sings with auto tune and everyone wants to go to his concert. Oscar, Bea, Milo, and Esmargot watched Brandon Bubbler's new song,U + Me = Luv. They danced to his music and Bea thought the song was "on fire". At the end of the episode, Bea, Oscar, Milo, and a few other Freshwater High students went to Brandon's concert ("Dollars and Fish").

characters.name: Brandon Bubbler
characters.description: Brandon BubblerCharacter informationAge:17Gender:MaleRelationshipsLove interests:Bea(ex-girlfriend)Background informationVoice by:Lil' TwistBrandon Bubbleris a teenage singing sensation first introduced in "Dollars and Fish". characters.name: Bud
characters.description: BudCharacter informationGender:MaleSpecies:HumanHome:United States of AmericaProfessional informationOccupation:Owner of a Pet StoreBackground informationVoice by:Dana SnyderIan James Corlett(Season 3)Budis the owner ofBud's Pets, the pet store in which the fish tanks that make up the world ofFish Hooksare contained. Bud is seen at the beginning of each episode, usually doing or interacting with something that relates to the episode's plot (the listing of what his store sells besides pets also changes accordingly with each episode's plot). Bud usually appears to be unaware of what is actually going on inside the fish tanks. The fish know him as "Big Blue". He appears to be very obese and has the appearance of a handy-man, so he may be the pet shop's janitor, too. Bud never speaks, but occasionally makes sounds, which are provided byDana Snyder. Bud is portrayed in photo-realistic "live action" by storyboard artist Sherm Cohen.

characters.name: Cabbie
characters.description: CabbieBackground informationFirst appearance:"Bea Becomes an Adult Fish"Voice by:Fred Tatasciore TheCabbieis the person who drove Bea to Fish Flakes, Inc. He was eating a worm and droveBeatoFish Flakes, Inc.in his yellow cab.

characters.name: Cabbie
characters.description: CabbieBackground informationFirst appearance:"Bea Becomes an Adult Fish"Voice by:Fred Tatasciore TheCabbieis the person who drove Bea to Fish Flakes, Inc. He was eating a worm and droveBeatoFish Flakes, Inc.in his yellow cab.

characters.name: Wilford
characters.description: WilfordCharacter informationGender:MaleSpecies:CatBackground informationFirst appearance:"Fish Out of Water"Voice by:John RatzenbergerScott Diggs Underwood(Fish Out of Water) Wilfordis the enormous cat roaming aroundBud's Pets. He likes to watch the fish swim around and hopes one will come out. WhenMilo,Oscar, andBeagot outside the tank with watersuits, they ran into Wilford. Milo thought that he was friendly, but Wilford roared at them, so they all ran away. They went inside a ball, but he jumps at the ball, which causes Milo go the opposite direction from Oscar and Bea. Oscar and Bea were hiding under a desk, trying to avoid him. Milo tries to save his friends, so he threw a bag of cat nip at him. Then he got a kitty pointer to make him further from Oscar and Bea, but the pointer slipped and ended up pointing at Oscar. Right about when Oscar and Bea were about to get eaten by him, Milo was hanging from a string and managed to trap Wilford. At the end,Budlooked at the pet store, which is now a mess, and blames Wilford, so he chases him with a broom ("Fish Out of Water"). Bud was once playing football with Wilford ("Underwater Boy"). He somehow got in a snake tank and got eaten by one of them ("Funny Fish"). When Milo became giant and roamed the halls of the pet store, he scared Wilford, so he ran away from him ("Big Fish"). WhenClamanthathrewWebster(Oscar's laptop)out the tank, Wilford stepped on it ("Two Clams in Love").

characters.name: Cat (Character)
characters.description: CatWild Animal. Catis a small orange kitten that only appear in "Little Fish Sunshine".

characters.name: Chief
characters.description: ChiefCharacter informationAge:50Gender:MaleSpecies:BlobfishBackground informationFirst appearance:"Dollars and Fish"Voice by:Blake ClarkChiefis the Blobfish boss of theHokey Poke. WhenMiloentered the Hokey Poke with his expensve outfit and motorcycle, he crashed the motorcycle in one of the seats, which made Chief angrliy shout at him that he just put a bike rack out front. Later when Milo wanted to work at the Hokey Poke, Chief told him that everythings under control, and they don't need help, butBassyreminded him the dozens of customers at the Hokey Poke, so Chief gave Milo the job to work at the cash register. After encouraging Milo ad teling him the job is very easy, Milo finally works the cash register and gets some money. However, it's not enough to pay backOscarandBea, so Chief tells Milo to sell his motorcycle ("Dollars and Fish"). Chief is apparenylh the fish with the most experience outside the tanks (Milo being second). Milo brought Bea and Oscar to the Hokey Poke to show Chief what he found, which was a penny. Milo told Bea and Oscar that Chief was in the Fish army, the king of the ferrets, and he only works in the Hokey Poke because his fin got caught in a lobster crash. Milo showed Chief the penny, and Chief said that it's a "people egg". He then told Milo, Oscar, and Bea to stay away from people due to an accident he had with them that occured when he tried peopleing. Chief once tried to capture "Big Blue", who was actuallyBud. Milo, Bea, and Oscar believed that Chief got his hook from the incident with Big Blue. Later when Milo got stuck on Big Blue's pocket, Oscar and Bea rushed to Chief, who was cooking up the "people egg". Oscar and Bea convinced Chief to go and save Milo. At Big Blue (Bud)'s pocket, Milo, who was drying up, started imagining Chief. Chief told Milo that he was trying to hard to make new friends, and he saved Milo's life because of that. Later when Milo found Bea, Oscar and Chief, Chief told them that he was born with his hook, and he didn't get the hook after his "accident" with Big Blue ("Peopleing").

characters.name: Chief
characters.description: ChiefCharacter informationAge:50Gender:MaleSpecies:BlobfishBackground informationFirst appearance:"Dollars and Fish"Voice by:Blake ClarkChiefis the Blobfish boss of theHokey Poke. WhenMiloentered the Hokey Poke with his expensve outfit and motorcycle, he crashed the motorcycle in one of the seats, which made Chief angrliy shout at him that he just put a bike rack out front. Later when Milo wanted to work at the Hokey Poke, Chief told him that everythings under control, and they don't need help, butBassyreminded him the dozens of customers at the Hokey Poke, so Chief gave Milo the job to work at the cash register. After encouraging Milo ad teling him the job is very easy, Milo finally works the cash register and gets some money. However, it's not enough to pay backOscarandBea, so Chief tells Milo to sell his motorcycle ("Dollars and Fish"). Chief is apparenylh the fish with the most experience outside the tanks (Milo being second). Milo brought Bea and Oscar to the Hokey Poke to show Chief what he found, which was a penny. Milo told Bea and Oscar that Chief was in the Fish army, the king of the ferrets, and he only works in the Hokey Poke because his fin got caught in a lobster crash. Milo showed Chief the penny, and Chief said that it's a "people egg". He then told Milo, Oscar, and Bea to stay away from people due to an accident he had with them that occured when he tried peopleing. Chief once tried to capture "Big Blue", who was actuallyBud. Milo, Bea, and Oscar believed that Chief got his hook from the incident with Big Blue. Later when Milo got stuck on Big Blue's pocket, Oscar and Bea rushed to Chief, who was cooking up the "people egg". Oscar and Bea convinced Chief to go and save Milo. At Big Blue (Bud)'s pocket, Milo, who was drying up, started imagining Chief. Chief told Milo that he was trying to hard to make new friends, and he saved Milo's life because of that. Later when Milo found Bea, Oscar and Chief, Chief told them that he was born with his hook, and he didn't get the hook after his "accident" with Big Blue ("Peopleing").

characters.name: Clamanda
characters.description: ClamandaCharacter informationAge:16Gender:FemaleSpecies:ClamProfessional informationAffiliations:St. Clamcis Clam School for ClamsClamettesRelationshipsAllies:ClamettesBackground informationFirst appearance:"Two Clams in Love"(Pictured scene only)Voice by:Busy PhilippsClamandais a clam fromSt. Clamcis Clam School for Clamsin a group of clams made as a cheering teamClamettesand is a rival ofClamantha. Clamanda is Clamantha's rival as seen for a long time. She has orange hair with a small ponytail. Clamettes, her cheerleading team are all clams that look the same except their hair. She seems to be kind of a mean girl of the series. There is nothing much known about her. WhenMiloandBeatried to look for a good club forOscar, the three of them went to the gym, where they saw two clams fighting. It turned out to be Clamantha, and the clam she was fighting was Clamanda, her rival. Clamantha used to be at theSt. Clamcis Clam School for Clams, along with Clamanda, but Clamantha got kicked out of the cheering squad. She wanted to beat Clamanda at the All-Species High School Cheering Squad Competition. Clamantha made her own cheer squad, the members being Clamantha herself, Oscar, Milo,Shellsea,Finberley,Koi,Esmargot, and Bea (although she had to go to the map club, but she joined the group at the contest). At the cheering squad competition, Clamanda taunted and made fun of Clamantha's new cheerleaders, but before the two can fight again, Oscar separated the two. She rolled her eyes when Clamantha's cheering squad did their routine. After Clamanda and her cheering squad did their cheering routine,Coach Salmonsrevealed that the winners were the Clamettes. Clamanda was overjoyed that she won, but Clamantha's cheering squad was too busy congratulating each other. After she pointed out to them that she is the winner and not them, Coach Salmons said that the real winners were Clamantha's cheering squad, with their trophy being much bigger than the one Clamanda had. Clamanda plotted revenge on Clamantha, but the Clamettes carried her out the door ("We've Got Fish Spirit").

characters.name: Clamantha
characters.description: ClamanthaCharacter informationAge:16Gender:FemaleSpecies:ClamHome:Bud's PetsProfessional informationOccupation:StudentHall MonitorCheerleaderAffiliations:Freshwater HighClamantha and the Shiny ObjectsRelationshipsAllies:Shellsea, Bea, Koi, Finberley, and EsmargotLove interests:Oscar(crush)Webster(ex-boyfriend)Enemies:ClamandaWebsterBackground informationFirst appearance:"Bea Stays in the Picture"Voice by:Alex Hirsch — Clamantha, often Clamanthais a clam and a student atFreshwater High. She has a obsessive crush onOscar, and is friends withBea,Shellsea,Finberley,EsmargotandKoi.

characters.name: Clamantha's parents
characters.description: Clamantha's momandClamantha's dad,GeraldareClamantha's parents.Clamantha's parentsCharacter informationGender:Male and FemaleSpecies:Pond clamsRelationshipsAllies:WebsterBackground informationFirst appearance:"Two Clams in Love"Voice by:Clamantha's Dad:Alex HirschClamantha's Mom:Dana Snyder Clamantha introducedWebsterto her parents, and her mom liked him, but not her dad. It is revealed that her dad is deaf, has no sense of smell, and only one of his eye works. Clamantha's mom told Webster that her dad is just in a bad mood because he is hungry. At dinner, Clamantha's dad liked him, and Clamantha and Webster left. Later on,Milo,OscarandBeawere in Clamantha's house so they can talk to Clamantha. Clamantha's parents followed them and said Clamantha locked herself in her room, and would only talk to Oscar ("Two Clams in Love").

characters.name: Clamettes
characters.description: TheClamettesare a cheerleader group of clams whereinClamanthaused to be the captain of, but was stolen byClamanda. The Clamettes were first seen working forRandyby making his fridge hats. Randy pointed out that they never stop working. Later when everyone lost their hair because of him, he got attacked by the Clamettes, who also seemed to have lost hair because of Randy's hat ("Milo's Big Idea"). The Clamettes were then seen in Clamanda's cheer squad at the "All-Species High School Cheering Squad." They remained silent when Clamanda was taunting or fighting Clamantha, but they still have some sort of grudge on Clamantha. After the Clamettes did their cheer,Coach Salmonsfirst said that the winners were the Clamettes. However, he then announced that the real winners were Clamantha's cheer squad, having a bigger trophy than the Clamettes. The Clamettes carried Clamanda away when she started plotting revenge on Clamantha ("We've Got Fish Spirit").
